description: Høland og Setskog Sparebank provides banking services for the retail and corporate markets in Norway. The company offers current, deposit, and savings accounts; business, investment, agricultural, and client accounts; bank and credit cards; eInvoice; mobile payments; and mobile and online banking. It also provides insurance products for cars, electric scooters, boats, motorcycles, mopeds, jet skis, caravans, motorhomes, ATVs, tractors, snowmobiles, trailers, and veteran cars; houses, household items, travel, cottages, valuable items, and drones; health, child, disability, critical illness, life, and accident; dogs, cats, and horses; and company, employees, and agriculture applications. In addition, the company offers bank, BSU, mutual fund, micro, and retirement savings; pension products; car loans, mortgages, senior loans for apartments, green mortgages, energy-saving loans, framework loans, consumer loans, cottage loans, fixed-rate loans, and refinancing of mortgages, as well as loans for boats, motorcycles, caravans, motorhomes, ATVs, and snowmobiles; refinancing of consumer debt; bank guarantees, business and construction loans, factoring and invoice management, overdraft, and leasing; and consulting and accounting services. The company was formerly known as Holand Sparebank and changed its name to Høland og Setskog Sparebank in July 2010. Høland og Setskog Sparebank was incorporated in 1849 and is headquartered in Bjørkelangen, Norway.
